title: Money Lane
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''"Money Lane"''' was [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] term for the shared field of fire on the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], where both her upper and lower [[Quad laser cannon/Legends|quad lasers]] could engage an enemy. Solo and his co-[[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], placed [[Gambling/Legends|bets]] on who could eliminate more enemy targets in this area.

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
